name: Nkarta, Inc.
business: Nkarta, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing allogeneic, off-the-shelf engineered natural killer (NK) cell therapies. Its lead product candidate, NKX019, is a chimeric antigen receptor NK cell therapy targeting the CD19 antigen for the treatment of autoimmune diseases. The company uses healthy donor-derived NK cells and a proprietary engineering platform to enhance cell targeting and persistence.
sellsTo: Autoimmune disease patients (lupus nephritis, primary membranous nephropathy, systemic sclerosis, myositis, ANCA-associated vasculitis)
namedSuppliers: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, Inc.

exposures.sentence: Our lead pipeline program is NKX019, a chimeric antigen receptor-natural killer ("CAR NK") product candidate targeting the CD19 antigen for the treatment of patients with autoimmune diseases.
